rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (world modeling with memory for dynamic subjects) and domain (video generation) as the user's question, specifically addressing the "hybrid" architecture and "world model" concepts central to the referenced SANA-WM work, even though it focuses on the specific sub-problem of occlusion handling rather than the exact minute-scale efficiency metric.
